title: build(deps): bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.32.1 to 1.32.2
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.32.1 to 1.32.2.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/storage's releases.

v1.32.2

lockfile: merge Seek+Read/Write into Pread/Pwrite
Added support for CONTAINERS_STORAGE_CONF override
canUseShifting can segfault
build(deps): bump github.com/mattn/go-shellwords from 1.0.11 to 1.0.12
build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.12.3 to 1.13.0
overlay: make userxattr,metacopy=on debug message
build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux from 1.8.1 to 1.8.2
Commits
  • 946fbb4 Bump to v1.32.2
  • 23c70d0 Merge pull request #938 from giuseppe/drop-lseek

  • 10afc92 lockfile: merge Seek+Read/Write into Pread/Pwrite
  • 74a6167 Added support for CONTAINERS_STORAGE_CONF override
  • 3b2f449 canUseShifting can segfault
  • 39e7061 Merge pull request #936 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/matt...
